topic: Ek banda export karta hai humse plain leke — shipping mein kya dikkat aati hai
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a large shipping invoice document with frustrated expression visible in hand gestures, the paper shows columns and text but no readable words, placed on a wooden office desk next to a sealed cardboard export box with shipping tape, warm overhead lighting, camera slowly pushes in on the document, serious mood showing export documentation problem, vertical 9:16 format, realistic business setting

Medium shot of a clean warehouse shipping counter showing multiple stacks of folded white and colored plain cotton t-shirts neatly arranged in separate piles of approximately 50 pieces each, export quality products ready for packing, an open large corrugated cardboard box in the foreground, bright warehouse fluorescent lighting, camera slowly pans right across the stacks, professional B2B textile export environment, vertical 9:16 format

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands typing on a laptop keyboard, the screen shows a commercial invoice template with columns for item description, HSN code, and specifications but no readable text, a plain white cotton t-shirt lies folded next to the laptop on a wooden desk, warm indoor office lighting, camera angle from slightly above showing hands and screen, documentation process for export, vertical 9:16 format, realistic business scenario

Medium overhead shot of a warehouse packing station showing two different packaging methods side by side — left side has a small courier box with approximately 100 folded plain t-shirts and a DHL/FedEx style label, right side shows a large sea freight carton box with approximately 500 t-shirts and industrial packing tape, bright warehouse lighting, camera tilts down slowly to show the size comparison, export shipping decision visualization, vertical 9:16 format

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands placing a properly labeled commercial invoice on top of a sealed export carton box, the invoice shows clear columns and professional formatting with barcodes visible but no readable text, a customs clearance stamp impression is visible on the document, the box is sitting on a clean warehouse table, satisfied hand movement showing completion, bright even lighting, camera slowly pulls back, successful export preparation conclusion, vertical 9:16 format

topic: Myth: Biowash sirf softness ke liye hai — nahi aur bhi fayda hai
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding two identical white cotton round-neck t-shirts side by side against a neutral grey background, one t-shirt has a noticeably rough fuzzy surface with visible fiber pilling, the other has a smooth clean surface, hands gently rubbing both fabrics to show texture difference, bright studio lighting from above, camera slowly pushes in to show fabric detail, vertical 9:16 format, realistic workshop environment visible in soft background blur

Medium overhead shot of a clean wooden work table showing a non-biowash white cotton t-shirt lying flat, camera zooms in slowly to reveal tiny cotton fiber pills and loose threads on the fabric surface under bright LED work lamp, a magnifying glass enters frame from right side held by Indian man's hand to emphasize the rough texture, small fabric lint particles visible on the table surface around the shirt, warm indoor lighting, vertical 9:16 format

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a screen printing squeegee applying blue ink across a white t-shirt on a printing table, the ink spreads unevenly leaving patchy areas and visible streaks on the non-biowash fabric surface, camera angle is slightly tilted top-down view, bright workshop lighting, hands pause mid-stroke showing the uneven ink distribution clearly, vertical 9:16 format, realistic printing studio environment

Medium shot of a textile quality testing table showing two printed white t-shirts side by side under bright examination light, left shirt shows patchy faded print on non-biowash fabric, right shirt shows vibrant even print on biowash fabric, Indian man's hands enter frame holding a color comparison card between both prints, camera slowly dollies forward focusing on the print quality difference, vertical 9:16 format, clean professional testing environment visible in background

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands smoothly folding a perfectly printed white biowash t-shirt with sharp vibrant DTG print design, fabric has a clean smooth surface with no pilling, hands run across the print showing excellent ink absorption and color depth, warm studio lighting highlights the premium fabric quality, camera slowly pulls back to show the neatly folded shirt on a clean table, satisfying final frame, vertical 9:16 format

topic: Customer ne black tshirt pe white DTF kiya — peeling kyu hui?
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a black cotton round-neck t-shirt with a large white DTF print on the chest showing visible peeling and cracking at the edges, fingers pointing to the damaged areas, warm indoor warehouse lighting, slight camera push-in movement to emphasize the peeling problem, realistic textile defect visible, vertical 9:16 format, starts with fully lit scene showing the damaged print immediately.

Medium overhead shot of a small DTF heat press machine on a clean wooden workshop table, black t-shirt placed flat on the lower platen with a white DTF transfer sheet positioned on top, machine lid open, digital temperature display visible showing 160 degrees in red LED, warm workshop lighting from above, camera static shot, realistic printing setup, vertical 9:16 format, scene starts with all elements clearly visible and well-lit from frame one.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands adjusting a digital temperature controller on a heat press machine, finger pressing the up button to increase temperature from 160 to 175 degrees shown on red LED display, black fabric visible on the press bed in background, warm industrial lighting, slight camera tilt down following the hand movement, realistic workshop equipment, vertical 9:16 format, begins with bright clear view of the temperature display being adjusted.

Medium shot of hands pressing down a heat press machine onto a black t-shirt with white DTF transfer, steam rising from the sides as pressure is applied, timer showing 12 seconds counting down on the machine display, warm workshop lighting creating slight glow around the press, camera static angle capturing the full pressing process, realistic heat press operation with visible steam effect, vertical 9:16 format, starts with press already positioned and action beginning immediately.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands peeling away the clear transfer film from a black t-shirt revealing a perfect crisp white DTF print underneath with sharp edges and smooth finish, film lifting cleanly without any adhesive residue, warm indoor lighting highlighting the quality result, slow upward camera movement following the peel, satisfying clean transfer result, vertical 9:16 format, scene opens with hands already beginning to peel the film with good lighting throughout.

topic: DTG printing ke liye pre-treatment zaroori hai — bina kiye print dhul jayega
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a white cotton round-neck t-shirt under bright indoor lighting, showing a large faded and patchy DTG print design that is visibly washed out and cracking. The hands stretch the fabric slightly to reveal how the ink is peeling off the surface. Camera slowly dollies in. Vertical 9:16 format, well-lit from frame one.

Warm fluorescent lighting, slight camera pan from the t-shirt stack toward the printer. Tools and spray bottles visible at the table edge. Vertical 9:16, bright and clear from first frame.

The mist is visible catching the overhead light. Camera angle is slightly from the side, showing the spray pattern and the wet sheen forming on the fabric. Vertical 9:16, well-lit workshop setting.

Close-up comparison shot on a clean table showing two white cotton t-shirts side by side after washing - left shirt has a bright vivid DTG print with sharp colors, right shirt has the same design but heavily faded and washed out. Indian man's hand points between the two shirts. Bright even lighting from above, slight camera dolly forward. Vertical 9:16 format.

Close-up shot of a DTG printer head moving across a pre-treated white cotton t-shirt, laying down vibrant multicolor ink in real time. The fabric shows a slight uniform sheen from pre-treatment. Camera positioned at a low angle looking across the print bed, warm workshop lighting with the printer mechanism in sharp focus. Vertical 9:16, action visible from first frame.
